months.title: 500 words · Present tense · Basic conversations
goals: Start daily listening (10-15 min slow French)

months.title: 1,000 words · Passé composé · Simple writing
goals: Start speaking out loud daily (Marie counts!)

months.title: 1,800 words · Imparfait · Listening practice
goals: Master imparfait vs passé composé usage
Watch/listen to native content with subtitles

months.title: 2,400 words · Conditionnel · Speaking every day
goals: Practice TEF-style speaking questions (Section A & B)
Compare two choices / give opinions out loud

months.title: 3,000 words · TEF question types · Mock speaking/writing
goals: Do full TEF-style writing tasks (email + essay)
Do full TEF-style speaking mock (both sections)
Review connectors — use them actively in writing

months.title: Full TEF Canada practice exams
goals: Daily speaking + listening, no new grammar

vocabularyBreakdown: Nouns 1,500 · Verbs 600 · Adjectives 500 · Adverbs 200 · Connectors 150 · Expressions 300 = 3,000 active words
